description: Create a Ship-to-Ship (STS) transfer training exercise in Bridge Command to simulate the approach phase of an STS operation in the Solent. The scenario directory at /opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/n) Solent STS Transfer Exercise/ must contain environment.ini (Solent, 08:00-16:00, weather <= 1.5, visibility >= 10.0), ownship.ini (MT Pacific Harmony, Lat 50.60-50.80, Long -1.30 to -1.00, speed 5.0-7.0 knots, heading 070-110), and othership.ini. The othership configuration requires three vessels: MT Caspian Star (parallel course within 10 degrees and 1 knot of own ship, 200m-800m abeam), Svitzer Neptune (positioned astern), and STS Guard 1 (positioned ahead). Simulation settings in bc5.ini must be configured with max_radar_range=12, radar_range_resolution=256, full_radar=1, arpa_on=1, and view_angle=90. Additionally, generate an operation briefing at /home/ga/Documents/sts_operation_briefing.txt that includes a reference to the OCIMF STS Transfer Guide, an approach procedure section, a safety checklist with at least 8 items (e.g., fendering, mooring), and an emergency breakaway procedure. Login credentials: ga / password123
